title: Miniature fruit and cheese still life for dollhouse in 1:12 scale 5
description: A colorful handcrafted miniature scene featuring watermelon, grapes, oranges, cheese, and a ceramic. Every tiny detail was sculpted and painted by me. All items are securely glued to the base. Perfect for collectors, dollhouse decoration, miniature kitchens, market scenes, dioramas, fairy gardens, and creative photography. This cheerful fruit arrangement will bring freshness and color to any miniature interior. Not suitable for children.
